upgrade.title: CiviCRM Upgrade Available
upgrade.message:
6.5.0 was released on 2025-08-06. The latest patch revision is 6.5.1 (2025-09-03).
6.6.0 was released on 2025-09-03. The latest patch revision is 6.6.3 (2025-09-24).
6.7.0 was released on 2025-10-02. The latest patch revision is 6.7.2 (2025-10-30).
6.8.0 was released on 2025-11-05.
